app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.54 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for another direct stream source, better header handling, and clearer playback routing.
releaseNotes: Working streams now appear progressively as each server responds
Added another direct stream source with HLS and MP4 support
Unavailable servers stay visible for the current request and can be retried later
Direct HLS, MP4, MKV, and embedded players are routed separately
Server labels now show cleaner quality and format information
Required playback headers are preserved through the player
Sports is disabled by default and can be enabled from Customize Tabs
Provider parser coverage was expanded for safer release stability

items.title: The Cube 2.0.54
items.message: Stream startup, server selection, and direct playback handling were improved.

items.title: Active Development Notice
items.message: THE CUBE is under heavy, active development. Expect frequent updates, sometimes multiple times a week, as features are added, bugs are fixed, and things get reworked. Breaking changes, UI shifts, and rough edges are part of the process right now.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
